title: Tunisian-Style Braised Beets with Spring Greens
description: A hearty, flavorful stew from Tunisia featuring tender beets and springy greens. Perfect for a cold evening or special occasion.

ingredients.name: tagine
ingredients.notes: dried apricots, prunes, and spices blend

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add garlic and lemongrass; cook 1 minute.
Add beets, cumin, paprika, salt, and pepper. Cook 2 minutes.
Add tagine and spring greens. Stir to combine.
Cover and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low and simmer 30 minutes.
Check beets for tenderness. If not tender, cover and simmer 15-30 minutes more.
Serve warm, garnished with lemon wedges and chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
